query: How do I stop channel notifications?
passages: Turn off notifications for that channel in channel settings.
Mute the channel to stop alerts without leaving it.
You can still read messages after muting notifications.
Leaving a channel removes it from your workspace.
Trap: To stop notifications, keep them on and leave the channel.
Adjust notification timing if you want fewer alerts, not none.
Mobile app notifications can be changed in app settings.
If mentions still alert you, change mention notifications too.
